issue_title: STM32F7 series can't run at frequencies higher than 180MHz
pr_title: drivers: clock_control: stm32f7 force flash latency with overdrive
pr_body:
The Flash latency depends on the sysclock but also in case of the stm32F7 on the regulator overdrive mode. The overdrive must be set before the first LL_SetFlashLatency.

Fixes https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr/issues/50853

Signed-off-by: Francois Ramu <francois.ramu@st.com>
